summary: Iteration 46: Live Push verification complete. Expanded catalog from 4 pilot divisions to 13 production-eligible divisions with 810 total products. All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live push completed. LIVE_FILTER replaced old PILOT_FILTER. 810 production-eligible products across 13 divisions. Portfolio renamed to Products/Product Catalog everywhere. /products redirects to /catalog via React Navigate.

catalog_divisions_api.GET /api/catalog/divisions: PASS - Returns 13 divisions with 810 total products

division_details_api.GET /api/catalog/divisions/endo-surgery: PASS - Returns Endo Surgery with 162 products
division_details_api.GET /api/catalog/divisions/infection-pre: PASS - Returns Infection Prevention with 80 products
division_details_api.GET /api/catalog/divisions/sports-medici: PASS - Returns Sports Medicine with 43 products

admin_login.POST /api/admin/login: PASS - Returns token with correct password

frontend_ui.catalog_index_page: PASS - Shows 'Product Catalog' title, 810 products, 13 divisions
frontend_ui.catalog_division_page: PASS - Shows Endo Surgery with 162 products, category sidebar
frontend_ui.nav_products_link: PASS - Single 'Products' link pointing to /catalog (no duplicate Portfolio)
